history.en: Ancient Scandinavian farm dog breed from eastern Denmark and southernmost Sweden, used as versatile all-purpose farm dog for ratting, herding, guarding, and companionship. Officially recognized in Denmark and Sweden in 1987, by FCI in 2008-2019, and The Kennel Club (UK) in 2019
history.zh: 古老斯堪的纳维亚农场犬种，来自丹麦东部和瑞典最南部，用作多功能农场犬，用于捕鼠、牧羊、守卫和陪伴。1987年在丹麦和瑞典获正式认可，2008-2019年获FCI认可，2019年获英国养犬俱乐部认可。

overview.en: The Danish-Swedish Farmdog is a small, sturdy terrier-like breed known for its alertness, friendliness, and boundless energy. Highly intelligent and eager to please, they are adaptable to various roles, from family companion to working farm dog. Their heritage as versatile farmhands makes them excellent ratters, herders, and watchdogs. They are naturally social and get along well with people and other animals when properly socialized. Despite their small size, they are robust and enjoy active play, making them ideal for families who can provide mental and physical stimulation. Their expression is lively and attentive, reflecting their intelligent and curious nature. This breed thrives on human companionship and can be quite vocal, alerting owners to anything unusual. Overall, the Danish-Swedish Farmdog is a joyful, loyal, and hardworking breed that fits well into an active household.
overview.zh: 丹麦瑞典农场犬是一种小巧、结实的梗类犬，以其警觉、友好和充沛的精力而闻名。它们非常聪明，渴望取悦主人，适应性强，既能成为家庭伴侣，也能胜任农场工作。作为多才多艺的农场犬，它们擅长捕鼠、放牧和看门。如果经过适当的社会化训练，它们天生善于社交，能与人和其它动物和睦相处。尽管体型小，但它们体格强健，喜欢活跃的游戏，非常适合能够提供身心刺激的家庭。它们表情活泼专注，反映了聪明好奇的天性。这一品种非常依赖人类陪伴，有时会吠叫以提醒主人注意异常情况。总体而言，丹麦瑞典农场犬是一种快乐、忠诚且勤劳的犬种，非常适合活跃的家庭。

care.en: Daily care for the Danish-Swedish Farmdog is straightforward. Their short, smooth coat requires minimal grooming – a weekly brush to remove loose hair and occasional baths when needed. They are moderate shedders. Exercise is crucial: aim for at least 30-60 minutes of activity daily, including walks, playtime, and mental challenges like puzzle toys or agility. They have high energy and need an outlet to prevent boredom. Regular vet check-ups (at least annually) are important to monitor health. Keep up with vaccinations, flea/tick prevention, and dental care. Trim nails monthly and check ears weekly for dirt or infection. Because they are intelligent and eager to please, they respond well to consistent routines. Early socialization and positive reinforcement training help them become well-adjusted adults. This breed is generally healthy but can be prone to patellar luxation and hip dysplasia, so maintain a healthy weight and provide joint supplements if recommended by your vet.
care.zh: 丹麦瑞典农场犬的日常护理很简单。它们短而光滑的被毛只需每周梳理一次以去除死毛，偶尔洗澡即可。掉毛量适中。运动至关重要：每天至少需要30-60分钟的活动，包括散步、玩耍以及益智玩具或敏捷训练等脑力挑战。它们精力充沛，需要发泄渠道以避免无聊。定期兽医检查（至少每年一次）对监测健康状况很重要。按时接种疫苗、进行跳蚤/蜱虫预防和牙齿护理。每月修剪指甲，每周检查耳朵是否有污垢或感染。由于它们聪明且渴望取悦，因此对一致的日常安排反应良好。早期社会化训练和正向强化训练有助于它们成为适应良好的成年犬。该品种通常健康，但可能易患髌骨脱位和髋关节发育不良，因此应保持健康体重，并在兽医建议下补充关节保健品。

training.en: Training a Danish-Swedish Farmdog is a rewarding experience due to their intelligence and eagerness to please. They excel in positive reinforcement methods, such as treats, praise, and play. Start training early, focusing on basic obedience like sit, stay, come, and loose-leash walking. Because they are alert and can be independent, consistency is key. Use short, engaging sessions (5-10 minutes) to hold their attention. They thrive on mental stimulation, so incorporate puzzle toys, nose work, or trick training. Socialization is critical: expose them to various people, animals, environments, and sounds from a young age to prevent shyness or reactivity. Avoid harsh corrections, as they can be sensitive and may become stubborn. They are natural problem-solvers, so channel their curiosity into constructive activities. Advanced training in agility, rally, or barn hunt can be excellent outlets for their energy and instincts. With patience and variety, they become obedient and well-mannered companions.
training.zh: 训练丹麦瑞典农场犬是一种有益的体验，因为它们聪明且渴望取悦主人。它们擅长正向强化训练，例如零食、表扬和玩耍。尽早开始训练，重点教授基本服从命令，如坐下、等待、过来和松绳散步。由于它们警觉且可能有些独立，一致性是关键。使用短而有趣的训练环节（5-10分钟）来保持它们的注意力。它们需要脑力刺激，因此可以加入益智玩具、嗅闻游戏或技巧训练。社会化训练至关重要：从小让它们接触不同的人、动物、环境和声音，以防止害羞或反应过度。避免严厉的纠正，因为它们可能敏感并变得固执。它们是天生的解决问题能手，所以将好奇心引导到建设性活动中。高级训练如敏捷、拉力赛或仓鼠狩猎可以很好地释放它们的精力和本能。通过耐心和多样性，它们会成为听话且举止得体的伴侣。

diet.en: Feed your Danish-Swedish Farmdog a high-quality, balanced diet appropriate for their age, size, and activity level. They typically do well on dry kibble formulated for small to medium breeds with moderate to high energy. Divide daily food into two meals to prevent bloat and maintain energy levels. Portion control is important to avoid obesity, as they can be food-motivated. Look for diets with real meat as the first ingredient, supplemented with healthy grains or vegetables. Avoid fillers like corn or soy. Fresh water should always be available. Treats can be used for training but should not exceed 10% of daily calories. Some may have food allergies, so monitor for signs like itching or digestive upset. Consult your vet for specific recommendations, especially if your dog is very active or has health conditions. Puppies need more frequent meals (3-4 times daily) and a diet formulated for growth. Senior dogs may require lower-calorie or joint-support formulas.
diet.zh: 为您的丹麦瑞典农场犬提供适合其年龄、体型和活动水平的高质量均衡饮食。它们通常适合食用为中小型、中高能量犬配制的干粮。将每日食物分成两餐，以预防胃胀气并维持能量水平。控制食量很重要，以避免肥胖，因为它们可能对食物很积极。寻找以真实肉类为首要成分、并补充健康谷物或蔬菜的配方。避免玉米或大豆等填充物。始终提供新鲜饮用水。零食可用于训练，但不应超过每日热量的10%。有些犬只可能存在食物过敏，因此需留意瘙痒或消化不良等迹象。咨询兽医获取具体建议，特别是如果您的狗非常活跃或有健康问题。幼犬需要更频繁的喂食（每天3-4次）以及专为成长配制的饮食。老年犬可能需要低热量或关节支持配方。

livingTips.en: The Danish-Swedish Farmdog adapts well to various living situations, including apartments, provided they get enough daily exercise. They are active indoors but need a securely fenced yard to burn off energy safely. This breed is excellent with children, especially if raised with them, and they enjoy play and companionship. However, they may be too energetic for very young toddlers. They generally get along with other dogs and cats if socialized early, but their terrier instincts may lead them to chase small pets like hamsters or birds. They are alert watchdogs and will bark to announce visitors, but they are not aggressive. They do best in homes where they are not left alone for long periods, as they can develop separation anxiety. Provide plenty of toys and mental stimulation when you are away. They enjoy being part of family activities and will follow you from room to room. Overall, they thrive in active, loving households that can meet their exercise and companionship needs.
livingTips.zh: 丹麦瑞典农场犬能很好地适应各种生活环境，包括公寓，前提是它们每天得到足够的运动。它们在室内很活跃，但需要一个安全围栏的院子来安全消耗精力。该品种非常适合有孩子的家庭，尤其是从小一起长大的孩子，它们喜欢玩耍和陪伴。不过，对于非常年幼的幼儿来说，它们可能过于精力充沛。如果早期进行社会化训练，它们通常能与其他狗和猫相处融洽，但它们的梗类本能可能导致追逐仓鼠或鸟类等小宠物。它们警觉性高，会吠叫提醒访客到来，但并无攻击性。它们最适合不被长时间单独留在家中的家庭，因为可能产生分离焦虑。离家时提供大量玩具和脑力刺激。它们喜欢参与家庭活动，会跟着你从一个房间到另一个房间。总的来说，它们活跃、有爱心的家庭中茁壮成长，只要满足其运动和陪伴需求。
